agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
My view has not changed.
Strongest opponent point: Religious exemptions can lead to discrimination against LGBTQ+ individuals and others who do not align with certain religious beliefs.
Counterargument: While there is a valid concern about potential discrimination, religious freedom is also a fundamental right. Balancing both rights through clear and specific legislation can protect against misuse while respecting religious liberties.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Religious exemptions bisa menyebabkan diskriminasi terhadap individu LGBTQ+ dan orang-orang yang tidak sesuai dengan keyakinan agama tertentu.
Counterargument saya: Meskipun ada kekhawatiran yang sah tentang potensi diskriminasi, kebebasan agama juga merupakan hak dasar. Melalui regulasi yang jelas dan spesifik, kedua hak tersebut dapat dilindungi dari penggunaan yang salah sambil menghormati bebas agama.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Religious exemptions can lead to discrimination against LGBTQ+ individuals and others who do not align with certain religious beliefs.
Counterargument: While there is a valid concern about potential discrimination, it is important to recognize that many religions promote equality and acceptance. Clear legislation that includes protections for all groups can ensure that religious freedom is respected without leading to discrimination.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Religious exemptions bisa memfasilitasi tindakan diskriminatif oleh mereka yang mengklaim kebebasan agama.
Counterargument saya: Solusi yang lebih baik adalah menerapkan standar etika bisnis dan layanan umum yang jelas. Hal ini dapat melindungi semua pihak tanpa mengurangi kebebasan agama.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.
